headline: Trading Technologies and Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam Agree to Offer MXV Members Access to Global Derivatives Markets Through TT® Infrastructure
summary: Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a global capital markets technology platform services provider, and the Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam (MXV) today announced they have signed an agreement for MXV to adopt TT's exchange connectivity services. The agreement will further enhance MXV's existing global connectivity, enabling its trading members and clients to access a broader range of international derivatives markets through TT's infrastructure alongside current channels.

content.title: Trading Technologies and Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam Agree to Offer MXV Members Access to Global Derivatives Markets Through TT® Infrastructure
content.summary: Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a global capital markets technology platform services provider, and the Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam (MXV) today announced they have signed an agreement for MXV to adopt TT's exchange connectivity services. The agreement will further enhance MXV's existing global connectivity, enabling its trading members and clients to access a broader range of international derivatives markets through TT's infrastructure alongside current channels.

headline: StoneX Announces Day-One Access to SHFE Nickel Futures

(“StoneX”; NASDAQ: SNEX) is now providing clients with day-one access to Nickel futures and options listed on the Shanghai Futures Exchange (SHFE). headline: Barchart's cmdtyView Platform Brings Powerful AI to the Global Commodity Industry
summary: Barchart, a leading provider of data, intelligence and trading solutions for commodity and financial markets, today announced the launch of Carl, an artificial intelligence assistant, directly into cmdtyView, Barchart's flagship platform for global commodity traders, merchandisers, brokers and analysts.

content.title: Barchart's cmdtyView Platform Brings Powerful AI to the Global Commodity Industry
content.summary: Barchart, a leading provider of data, intelligence and trading solutions for commodity and financial markets, today announced the launch of Carl, an artificial intelligence assistant, directly into cmdtyView, Barchart's flagship platform for global commodity traders, merchandisers, brokers and analysts.

headline: CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q1 CY2026 Earnings
summary: Financial derivatives exchange CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 14.5% year on year to $1.88 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.36 per share was 0.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q1 CY2026 Earnings
content.summary: Financial derivatives exchange CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 14.5% year on year to $1.88 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.36 per share was 0.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: CME (CME) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Terrence Duffy: Thanks, Adam, and thank you all for joining us this morning.  The third quarter average daily volume of 25.3 million contracts represented the second highest third quarter average daily volume in our history, following the record quarter a year ago.  Customers continue to turn to our markets to manage their risk exposures as demonstrated by quarter and year-end open interest of 126 million contracts, the highest open interest at the end of September in the last 5 years and continuing to grow in October.

content.title: CME (CME) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
content.summary: Terrence Duffy: Thanks, Adam, and thank you all for joining us this morning.  The third quarter average daily volume of 25.3 million contracts represented the second highest third quarter average daily volume in our history, following the record quarter a year ago.  Customers continue to turn to our markets to manage their risk exposures as demonstrated by quarter and year-end open interest of 126 million contracts, the highest open interest at the end of September in the last 5 years and continuing to grow in October.

headline: CME (CME) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Terry Duffy: Thanks, Adam, and thank you all for joining us this morning.  Following that, Lynne will provide an overview of our financial results and our 2025 guidance.  2024 was the best year in CME Group's history and our fourth consecutive year of record volume with average daily volume increasing 9% to 26.9 million contracts.

headline: CME (CME) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Terrence Duffy: Thanks, Adam, and thank you all for joining us this morning.  For the first time in CME Group's history, average daily volume exceeded 30 million contracts for this quarter.  Second quarter average daily volume of 30.2 million contracts represented an increase of 16% compared to the same period last year and included all-time records in each month of the quarter.

content.title: CME (CME) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
content.summary: Terrence Duffy: Thanks, Adam, and thank you all for joining us this morning.  For the first time in CME Group's history, average daily volume exceeded 30 million contracts for this quarter.  Second quarter average daily volume of 30.2 million contracts represented an increase of 16% compared to the same period last year and included all-time records in each month of the quarter.

headline: CME Group Record Results Highlight Growing Volumes And New Derivatives Tools
summary: CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME) reported record quarterly results, with first quarter revenue and net income reaching all time highs. Performance was supported by a 22% jump in average daily volume across all asset classes and higher participation from non U.S. clients. The company broadened its derivatives offering with new options on Eris SOFR Swap futures and updates to its Equity Index Dividend products. CME Group, trading around $284.4, has delivered record financial results that sit...
